snippet.title: Wir sind da: Trailer zum Tag der Bundeswehr 2026 | Bundeswehr
snippet.description:
"Wir sind da": Am 6. Juni 2026 öffnen sich wieder die Tore zum Tag der #Bundeswehr. Von Kastellaun bis Weiden, von Eckernförde bis München - An zehn Standorten können sich Bürgerinnen und Bürger aus erster Hand über die Arbeit der Soldatinnen und Soldaten sowie zivile Beschäftigte, ihre Ausrüstung und Technik informieren.

Neben der Truppe steht an diesem Tag Rede und Antwort: Über den Soldatenberuf und zu den vielen militärischen sowie zivilen Karrierewegen der Bundeswehr informieren auch Karriereberaterinnen und -berater. Einen exklusiven Einblick und Zugang zu besonderen Höhepunkten erhalten junge Erwachsene durch Talentscouts.

Solltet ihr es nicht zum Tag der Bundeswehr schaffen, gibt es auch dieses Jahr wieder einen Livestream ab 11:00 Uhr auf unserem YouTube-Kanal.

Worüber freut ihr euch am meisten beim Tag der Bundeswehr?

Welche Standorte ihre Tore öffnen und weiter Informationen erfahrt ihr hier: https://www.bundeswehr.de/de/bundeswehr-erleben/tag-der-bundeswehr

Bei Interesse an der Verwendung unserer Videos wende dich bitte an: mediendatenbank@bundeswehr.org

Quelle: Redaktion der Bundeswehr  
05/2025

snippet.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 | Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
No line holds forever.

October 23, 2026.

https://a.atvi.com/PreOrder-MW4

War erupts on the Korean Peninsula as North Korea launches a full-scale invasion that threatens to destabilize the world in Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. A young squad of South Korean soldiers fight to survive on the collapsing front lines, while half a world away a vengeful Captain Price wages a personal war from the shadows as he stays one step ahead of those hunting him. As Price’s off-book mission collides with the forces behind the invasion, the war spreads beyond anyone’s control.

Developed by Infinity Ward, Modern Warfare 4 pushes the series into darker and more dangerous territory, where consequence and escalation bring long-running storylines to a powerful and emotional breaking point. Campaign drops players into trench warfare in Korea, close-quarters combat in New York, high-octane chases through Paris, SAS night raids in Mumbai, and city-wide assaults to reclaim occupied territory. Multiplayer delivers grounded, precise combat where fluid movement, player choice, and greater control define every engagement. In DMZ, players operate as an off-the-books asset behind enemy lines, where every extraction run into contested territory forces hard choices about which objectives to pursue, what to secure, and when to get out.

snippet.title: ELF HELDEN – EIN ALBTRAUM | offizieller Trailer | BROADVIEW
snippet.description:
Ab 2. Juni in der ARD Mediathek – und am 14. Juni um 22 Uhr im Ersten
 
Eine Produktion von Leopold Hoesch, eine Serie von Manfred Oldenburg. BROADVIEW in Zusammenarbeit mit NDR, WDR & BR für die ARD. Gefördert durch die Film- und Medienstiftung NRW und den German Motion Picture Fund
 
Zur Fußball-WM 94 in den USA tritt das DFB Team als Favorit und Titelverteidiger an. Interne Konflikte, mediale Kampagnen und Häme gegen Bundestrainer Berti Vogts führen dazu, dass sich die vermeintlichen elf Freunde – Spieler wie Lothar Matthäus, Stefan Effenberg, Bodo Illgner und Matthias Sammer – in wenigen Wochen in einen kollektiven Albtraum manövrieren. Elf Helden – Ein Albtraum wirft einen Blick hinter die Kulissen des für Deutschland denkwürdigen WM-Turniers 1994 und zeigt, wie eine der stärksten deutschen Teams aller Zeiten spektakulär scheiterte.
 
#WM94 #DFB #DieMannschaft #ElfHeldenEinAlbtraum #BROADVIEW 

__________________________________________________________ 

Abonniere Broadview Pictures: https://bit.ly/37Ep7R3
Vimeo: http://bit.ly/38VcwsI
Facebook: http://bit.ly/2OMnjg1
X: http://bit.ly/35uOsLg
Instagram: http://bit.ly/2Dk4Yls
__________________________________________________________ 

BROADVIEW is one of the leading independent German documentary film production companies. The production house has established itself over the last twelve years in the sectors of contemporary history, current affairs and culture as a reliable partner for German and international broadcasters and distributors. The received awards include an International Emmy, German Television Price, Magnolia Award and Banff Television Award.

The company's successes over the years are characterised by the appropriate treatment of highly controversial historical subjects, interviews conducted in sensitive fashion, thorough archive research and stylish dramatic structure. The picture is rounded off by collaboration with major composers and orchestras, and the lavish musical score lends a distinctive tone to the films - many of which are written and directed by award winning directors.

unstable smp civil war

I Went to WAR on a Hardcore Minecraft SMP

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨ @ParrotX2 
➜   @FlameFragsMC 
➜   @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨ @wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring:@yungymc @JadenMAN @FlameFragsMC @Lomedy @Spongs @saparata @ParrotX2 @LettuceK @TheobaldTheBird @fymada 

cindercrest blimp design: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IZTobBVAJ6U

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/user/andreaszoellermusic
https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prophet (dialogue) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nreMC82GPo4 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

know that i will find my way from you

hate that i made you love me

i’ve held your projections when you’ve felt so insecure

i don’t really think so 
 
 i i i 
hate that i made you love me

yeah i i hate that i made you love me

snippet.title: Habibi — 2Pac & Murat Koff | Deep House Remix 2026
snippet.description:
#muratkoff #habibi #deephouse #2pac

🎧 Habibi — 2Pac & Murat Koff | Deep House Remix 2026
Produced & Remixed by Murat Koff
A deep house tribute. Made in Montréal.

🔔 Subscribe + bell notification — new drops every Tuesday & Thursday at 14:00 GMT.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

🎧 ABOUT — HABIBI (DEEP HOUSE REMIX)

Habibi — "my love" in Arabic — is the universal word for connection across cultures. This deep house reimagining brings together the raw energy of 2Pac with the melodic atmosphere of Middle Eastern night drive music. Produced by Murat Koff, the track bridges hip-hop's lyrical fire with deep house's emotional depth.

For the late drives. For the lost connections. For the ones we still call habibi.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

#muratkoff #habibi #deephouse #2pac

🎧 Habibi — 2Pac & Murat Koff | Deep House Remix 2026
Produced & Remixed by Murat Koff
A deep house tribute. Made in Montréal.

🔔 Subscribe + bell notification — new drops every Tuesday & Thursday at 14:00 GMT.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

🎧 ABOUT — HABIBI (DEEP HOUSE REMIX)

Habibi — "my love" in Arabic — is the universal word for connection across cultures. This deep house reimagining brings together the raw energy of 2Pac with the melodic atmosphere of Middle Eastern night drive music. Produced by Murat Koff, the track bridges hip-hop's lyrical fire with deep house's emotional depth.

For the late drives. For the lost connections. For the ones we still call habibi.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

🌙 MURAT KOFF × 2PAC — THE SERIES

All tracks produced & remixed by Murat Koff, available on this channel:
Habibi · Ruff Ryders' Anthem · Hellrazor · Ambitionz · CTRL Money · I Got The Click · Only Fear of Death · All Eyez On Me · Bad Boy · My Cash $$

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

🎼 ABOUT MURAT KOFF

Murat Koff is a Deep House producer based in Montréal, Canada — known for night drive remixes of hip-hop classics. Over 1M monthly views on YouTube. New releases every Tuesday & Thursday at 14:00 GMT.

Genre: Deep House · Car Music · Thug Life · Hip-Hop Remix · Atmospheric Bass

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

⚠️ COPYRIGHT DISCLAIMER

This is an independent tribute remix produced by Murat Koff. It is not affiliated with the official labels or estates of 2Pac. All original copyrights belong to their respective owners.

If you're a copyright holder with concerns regarding this content, please contact us via the channel — we will respond promptly and act in good faith.
